result.markdown:
--- title: "3. CRM Segmentation" subtitle: "Mixed Numeric and Categorical Account Segmentation" --- ## Framing CRM and account-level segmentation often combines: - numeric variables such as tenure, spend, and support load, - categorical variables such as region, plan type, channel, and industry. A mixed-type workflow can be handled cleanly with a `ColumnTransformer` that standardizes numeric columns and one-hot encodes categorical columns, followed by clustering. ## Generate synthetic CRM data ::: {#cell-crm-generate .cell execution_count=2} ::: {#crm-generate .cell-output .cell-output-display execution_count=2} ```{=html}
true_segment annual_spend tenure_months support_tickets engagement_score region plan_type acquisition_channel industry
0 SMB Self-Serve 976.179270 6.669239 3.116874 35.353740 Midwest Basic Product-Led Education
1 SMB Self-Serve 640.003973 10.299644 1.631027 45.605917 West Standard Product-Led Education
2 SMB Self-Serve 1087.612799 6.274561 0.497656 28.093146 Midwest Basic Web Services
3 SMB Self-Serve 1135.141179 7.742331 1.390273 56.387055 Midwest Standard Web Retail
4 SMB Self-Serve 412.241203 5.829650 1.464389 40.559723 West Basic Web Education
``` ::: ::: ## Build the preprocessing pipeline ::: {#cell-crm-prep .cell execution_count=3} ::: {#crm-prep .cell-output .cell-output-display execution_count=3} ``` (480, 24) ``` ::: ::: ## Choose the number of clusters ::: {#cell-crm-eval .cell execution_count=4} ::: {#crm-eval .cell-output .cell-output-display execution_count=4} ```{=html}
k inertia silhouette
0 2 1959.879114 0.372738
1 3 1510.688695 0.294478
2 4 1426.698136 0.236934
3 5 1344.757862 0.184595
4 6 1266.447916 0.159137
``` ::: ::: ::: {#cell-crm-metric-plot .cell execution_count=5} ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-display} ![](crm_files/figure-html/crm-metric-plot-output-1.png){#crm-metric-plot width=1142 height=374} ::: ::: ## Fit the CRM segmentation model ::: {#cell-crm-fit .cell execution_count=6} ::: {#crm-fit .cell-output .cell-output-display execution_count=6} ```{=html}
true_segment annual_spend tenure_months support_tickets engagement_score region plan_type acquisition_channel industry segment
0 SMB Self-Serve 976.179270 6.669239 3.116874 35.353740 Midwest Basic Product-Led Education 2
1 SMB Self-Serve 640.003973 10.299644 1.631027 45.605917 West Standard Product-Led Education 2
2 SMB Self-Serve 1087.612799 6.274561 0.497656 28.093146 Midwest Basic Web Services 2
3 SMB Self-Serve 1135.141179 7.742331 1.390273 56.387055 Midwest Standard Web Retail 2
4 SMB Self-Serve 412.241203 5.829650 1.464389 40.559723 West Basic Web Education 2
``` ::: ::: ## Visualize the CRM segments ::: {#cell-crm-pca .cell execution_count=7} ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-display} ![](crm_files/figure-html/crm-pca-output-1.png){#crm-pca width=600 height=449} ::: ::: ## Numeric CRM profile table ::: {#cell-crm-profile-numeric .cell execution_count=8} ::: {#crm-profile-numeric .cell-output .cell-output-display execution_count=8} ```{=html}
segment_rank annual_spend tenure_months support_tickets engagement_score
segment
1 1 28037.33 39.39 8.93 80.84
0 2 6529.13 21.82 4.14 65.36
2 3 884.69 5.81 1.58 40.48
``` ::: ::: ## Categorical CRM profile table ::: {#cell-crm-profile-categorical .cell execution_count=9} ::: {#crm-profile-categorical .cell-output .cell-output-display execution_count=9} ```{=html}
region plan_type acquisition_channel industry
segment
0 West Standard Sales Healthcare
1 Northeast Premium Field Finance
2 West Basic Product-Led Education
``` ::: ::: ## Cross-tab against the latent CRM segments ::: {#cell-crm-crosstab .cell execution_count=10} ::: {#crm-crosstab .cell-output .cell-output-display execution_count=10} ```{=html}
true_segment Enterprise Direct Midmarket Partner SMB Self-Serve
segment
0 0 160 0
1 160 0 0
2 0 0 160
``` ::: ::: ## Interpretation A typical practical reading might be: - one segment is **small self-serve accounts** with low tenure and low spend, - one segment is **midmarket partner-led accounts** with moderate spend and mixed support needs, - one segment is **enterprise direct accounts** with high spend, longer tenure, and higher engagement.
